response.justification: The candidate has extensive software development experience but lacks direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator architecture, or hardware-software co-design, which are core to the Principal Performance Architect role. While they demonstrate strong software engineering skills and optimization experience, their background is heavily skewed toward web, mobile, and backend systems rather than hardware or AI workload optimization. The depth of relevant technical expertise does not align with the principal-level requirements.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with experience in performance optimization and system architecture design
Proficiency in multiple programming languages and tools (TypeScript, Node.js, D, C/C++, etc.)
Experience with scalable systems and real-time data processing
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator optimization
Lacks required qualifications (PhD/advanced degree + years of experience) for the principal-level role
Background primarily in software/web development, not hardware-software co-design or AI workload analysis

key_factors.factor: Advanced degree and years of experience
AI accelerator or deep-learning optimization experience
